subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Knowest thou what bounty thou hast been favored with? From the lamp of guidance thou hast illumined the glass of thy heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده خدا هیچ دانی که موفق بچه موهبتی گشتی از شمع هدی زجاجه دل را روشن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @thankfulness; gratitude
